title: Valorant streamer GrannyGamingz reveals heartbreaking reason behind return to streaming
summary_full: A grandmother, GrannyGamingz, is streaming Valorant to fund a headstone for her daughter, Brooke. Brooke, who passed away in 2023, had encouraged her grandmother to become a streamer. GrannyGamingz aims to honor her daughter's memory through her streams. She also seeks legal assistance to share her daughter's story. Viewers are showing strong support for her cause.
